name: game-sims
description: Re-runnable balance simulation harnesses for the games/ prototypes

scripts.sim:validity: node loopline-sim.js --validity && node warband-sim.js --validity && node dungeondeal-sim.js --validity && node depths-sim.js --validity
scripts.test: npm run check:syntax && npm run warband:mechanics && npm run swarm:smoke && npm run swarm:mechanics && npm run dungeondeal:mechanics && npm run meta:mechanics && npm run sim:validity
